hero.subtitle: Turning ideas into modern, high-performance and scalable web applications

about.title: About
about.p1_middle: , a Full-Stack developer in training at UNIFACS. I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Java Spring Boot and Python, building complete applications from the
about.p2: As a freelancer, I have already delivered real projects: lead generation platforms focused on conversion, mock exam systems with real-time data, and institutional websites with a dynamic CMS — always integrating n8n automations and Artificial Intelligence solutions to optimize processes and user experience.
about.p3: Beyond the technical side, I value the human aspect of development greatly. I communicate well, enjoy teamwork, and know how to take feedback to grow alongside the team. I am organized, adapt quickly to new contexts, and see every challenge as a learning opportunity. I believe a good developer is not only someone who writes good code, but someone who collaborates well and delivers responsibly.

stacks.title: My
stacks.subtitle: Main technologies and tools that make up my development ecosystem.

projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: Here are some of my recent works that I developed to sharpen my skills. Click on the cards to see more details.

beaba.title: Beaba Approval
beaba.subtitle: Web platform for CNH preparatory mock exams
beaba.description: Development of a mock exam platform focused on CNH preparation, with a focus on lead conversion and user experience. The application offers simulations by category, questions with images, personalized feedback, performance diagnosis and an evolution dashboard. It also features video content and motivational elements, all in a light, dynamic and intuitive interface. Plan release occurs automatically after payment confirmation, ensuring an agile and fully automated journey for the user.

fadas.title: Fadas Studio
fadas.subtitle: Digital marketing agency
fadas.description: Institutional development for Fadas Studio, a digital marketing company focused on strategic positioning and brand growth in the online environment. The project was built with a focus on clear presentation of services, strengthening brand identity and generating business opportunities. The application has a content management system (CMS), allowing dynamic editing of texts, media and website sections in a practical and scalable way. The platform highlights solutions such as traffic management, content creation and digital strategies, with modern, objective and conversion-oriented communication, providing fluid navigation and a professional experience for the user.

aurora.title: Aurora Logic
aurora.subtitle: Landing page focused on Pythagorean numerology
aurora.description: Development of a landing page for Aurora Lógica, focused on converting leads interested in name analysis and numerology. The application was structured with a VSL and conversion-oriented communication, providing a direct and engaging experience for the user. Incoming data, such as name and email, are processed by an API responsible for numerological calculations. After payment confirmation, the user automatically receives a personalized report by email, generated with AI support, containing analyzes, interpretations and suggestions based on their name. The entire flow is automated, ensuring scalability and agility in service delivery.

invest.title: Invest AI
invest.subtitle: AI Investment Platform (Academic)
invest.description: Development of a financial analysis and alert platform for the Brazilian (B3) and US markets, delivering real-time insights. The application uses n8n for automated data ingestion via APIs and global news, feeding JavaScript algorithms that calculate variations and dynamic rankings. The system has a secure backend in Supabase (PostgreSQL) and a high-performance frontend with React 18 and TanStack Query. To engage the investor, the platform integrates automatic target price alerts via WhatsApp and daily reports generated by AI via email, ensuring an agile, scalable and secure experience

coracao.title: Student's Heart
coracao.subtitle: Institutional web page and academic portal (Volunteer)
coracao.description: Volunteer development of an institutional platform and academic portal for a community school, focused on optimizing management and school communication. The application was built with Node.js and PostgreSQL, ensuring security through JWT authentication and access control by profiles (student, teacher and administrator). The system centralizes the school routine, offering access to report cards, a digital agenda with push notifications, an event gallery and specific panels for posting grades and full management of accounts and announcements. The project delivers a practical, scalable and accessible solution for the entire community.

multibot.title: MultiBot
multibot.subtitle: WhatsApp Message Automation Platform
multibot.description: Development of a complete WhatsApp customer service automation system, integrated into a modern, multi-user web administrative panel. The platform, built with Node.js and PostgreSQL, uses Chromium to connect and manage multiple WhatsApp instances simultaneously. The system allows for the creation of customizable menus, dynamic conversation flows and automatic responses based on business hours. With security guaranteed by JWT authentication, the application centralizes, automates and scales customer support management efficiently.

shoppeasy.title: ShoppEasy E-commerce
shoppeasy.subtitle: E-commerce with shopping cart and checkout (Academic)
shoppeasy.description: Development of a complete e-commerce platform using Python and Django REST Framework on the backend, integrated with a responsive frontend built with React and Vite to deliver a lightweight and pleasant aesthetic interface. The application allows browsing by product categories (clothing, electronics and books) and centralizes all catalog and inventory management through Django Admin. The system has essential features for conversion, including a dynamic shopping cart, detail pages with a display of related products and a user profile area. With security structured via JWT authentication, the API manages all data flow efficiently, providing a fluid browsing journey.

contact.title: Let's
contact.subtitle: I am always open to new opportunities and challenges. If you have a project in mind or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out.
